privileged_info_summary: The task creates a custom Live Template named 'logger' in a template group called 'Custom' using IntelliJ IDEA 2024.3.1.1 with Java 17. The template inserts an SLF4J 2.0.7 logger using the pattern 'private static final org.slf4j.Logger log = org.slf4j.LoggerFactory.getLogger($CLASS$.class);' where $CLASS$ is bound to the className() expression. The target project is a Maven project at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/payment-service with a PaymentService.java class file located at src/main/java/com/example/payment/PaymentService.java. All claimed versions and APIs are verified as real and publicly available.
